subcodes.first_line: O my kind friends! 'Abdu'l-Bahá is drowned in an ocean of sorrows and pain, captive in chains, in his longing for you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان من عبدالبهاء از حسرت شما غریق دریای احزان و آلام و اسیر زنجیر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for pilgrims, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
